body:
This PR adds `Var.split_by_season_across_time`. The difference between this and `Var.split_by_season` is that the splitting is also done across time. 

- [x] Add to NEWS.md
- [x] Add documentation
title: Add Var.split_by_season_across_time

body:
This PR adds partial resampling by adding the keyword argument `dim_names` to `Var.resampled_as`.

We also add `Var.find_corresponding_dim_name` which allows one to find the name of the dimension in a `OutputVar` by using another dimension name. 

- [x] Add documentation for both of the functions in the API
- [x] Add features to NEWS.md
title: Add partial resampling

body:
closes #210, closes #211 - This PR adds `Var.average_lonlat` and `Var.weighted_average_lonlat` and fixes `Var.average_xy`.

## To-do
- [x] Add to NEWS.md
- [x] Add to API.md
- [x] Add one more test case for error handling
- [X] Fix `Var.average_xy` when there are `NaN`s
title: Add Var.average_lonlat and weighted version of it
